_note: Community page template binding map. Each slot identifies a UI location, its data type, proposed API source, and region-awareness. Prepared for the news console aggregator targeting Toronto, Paris, L.A. and future cities.

ticker.slot: Scrolling headline ticker — top of page
ticker.notes: Mix network headlines + local arts news RSS + collective announcements. Breaking items float to front.

masthead.leftBanner.current: Org profile (displayName, discipline, city, bio snippet)
masthead.leftBanner.notes: This is the org-specific spotlight. Could rotate: daily featured artist from the region.

masthead.rightBanner.slot: Right masthead banner — auth / join CTA
masthead.rightBanner.current: Static login/signup links (conditional on auth state)
masthead.rightBanner.notes: No aggregation needed. Could show 'X artists in Toronto joined this month' count.

leftColumn.weather.bindTo: GET /api/weather?city={city} (wrap Open-Meteo or similar free API)
leftColumn.weather.notes: City pulled from org.profile.city OR user's region preference. Toronto=C, Paris=C, L.A=F optional.

leftColumn.events.slot: Left column — Events This Week list
leftColumn.events.current: Live from getOrgFeed() filtered by scheduled_at > now
leftColumn.events.notes: Aggregator should also pull events from OTHER orgs in same city. Tap into a regional events table. Cross-collective.

leftColumn.artistSpotlight.notes: Rotate daily. Could be manually curated via admin console OR auto-selected by activity score.

leftColumn.regionalNews.slot: Left column — Regional Arts news list
leftColumn.regionalNews.notes: Per-city RSS sources: Toronto Arts Council, Conseil des arts de Paris, LA Arts Commission etc. Admin-configurable per region.

centerColumn.featuredStory.slot: Center column — Featured Article (lead story with image)
centerColumn.featuredStory.notes: PRIORITY SLOT — this is the editorial centrepiece. Should be manually publishable from the news console. Org owners can pin a thread here.

centerColumn.featuredImage.slot: Center column — Featured article image (190px tall placeholder)
centerColumn.featuredImage.notes: Should wire to media upload system. Allow org owners to set via hub. Fall back to org gallery if not set.

centerColumn.joinBlock.current: Conditional: Join CTA (logged out) or Member bar (logged in)
centerColumn.joinBlock.bindTo: session — no API. Could enrich with: GET /api/stats?region={city}
centerColumn.joinBlock.notes: Add social proof: 'Join 142 artists in Toronto'. Counter from regional membership stats.

centerColumn.networkFeed.slot: Center column — Latest from the network grid (2-col)
centerColumn.networkFeed.current: Live from getCommunityFeed() — cross-org public threads
centerColumn.networkFeed.notes: Currently global — needs region filter. Toronto shows Toronto collective posts, Paris shows Paris, etc. Cross-city 'Network wide' toggle.

centerColumn.workshopList.current: Live from orgFeed filtered by kind=workshop|event
centerColumn.workshopList.notes: Regional aggregation: show workshops from ALL orgs in the region, not just current org.

rightColumn.artNews.slot: Right column — Art News feed (tagged headlines)
rightColumn.artNews.current: Static placeholder copy with category tags
rightColumn.artNews.notes: Per-city art news RSS. Toronto: NOW Mag, Art Toronto; Paris: Le Journal des Arts; L.A: KCRW Arts, Artforum. Admin-configurable.

rightColumn.communityPoll.notes: Polls can be org-specific or network-wide. News console should have a poll builder. Show vote percentages once user has voted.

rightColumn.resources.slot: Right column — Resources list (open calls, grants, spaces)
rightColumn.resources.notes: Urgency-sort: resources with approaching deadlines float up. Toronto Arts Council, Conseil des arts de Montréal, etc.

rightColumn.reserveAPlace.slot: Right column — Reserve a place (RSVP upcoming)
rightColumn.reserveAPlace.notes: RSVP links should go to event detail page or inline modal. Track seats remaining.

galleryStrip.slot: Gallery strip — 8 image thumbnails + upload button
galleryStrip.notes: Gallery can mix org-specific + regional collective work. Upload button → media upload API. Consider: curated + member-submitted tiers.

article2.slot: Article 2 — Classic image-left / text-right traditional article
article2.notes: Second editorial slot. News console should allow publishing directly here. Different article from featuredStory — complementary content.

_consoleActions: Configure regional RSS sources (slots: leftColumn.regionalNews, rightColumn.artNews)
